title: Auto Start (request)
description: Start an automated trading run following a predefined strategy

contract_template.description: Template defining the contract parameters to be used for each purchase in this run

barrier.description: [Optional] Barrier for the contract (or last digit prediction for digit contracts)

barrier2.description: [Optional] Low barrier for the contract (for contracts with two barriers)

basis.description: [Optional] Indicates whether amount is 'payout' or 'stake' for binary options

duration_unit.description: [Optional] Duration unit: `s` seconds, `m` minutes, `h` hours, `d` days, `t` ticks

growth_rate.description: [Optional] Growth rate of an accumulator contract

limit_order.description: [Optional] Order to close the contract once the order condition is met (only for `MULTUP`, `MULTDOWN`, and `ACCU` contracts)

stop_loss.description: Contract will be automatically closed when the value reaches a specific loss

take_profit.description: Contract will be automatically closed when the value reaches a specific profit

selected_tick.description: [Optional] The tick predicted to have the highest/lowest value - for tickhigh and ticklow contracts

strategy_id.description: Identifier of the strategy to run

strategy_parameters.description: Parameters specific to the selected strategy (e.g. martingale multiplier, max rounds)

subscribe.description: [Optional] If set to `1`, will stream run updates (new contracts purchased, status changes) until the run ends or `forget` is called.

passthrough.description: [Optional] Used to pass data through the websocket, which may be retrieved via the `echo_req` output field.

req_id.description: [Optional] Used to map request to response.
